title: Senior Investment Banker at Union Bank of India

jsonLd.title: Senior Investment Banker at Union Bank of India
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Union Bank of India! We are hiring a Investment Banker for our Chandigarh team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Union Bank of India:
Union Bank of India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Ind AS

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Union Bank of India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
